style_summary: A black-and-white footwear product analysis poster system with an oversized sneaker hero, pale engineering grid, top-strip evidence panels, macro material callouts, thin technical connector lines, pixelated uppercase typography, and coarse halftone print texture.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main footwear subject
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: how the footwear is presented or analyzed
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: shoe product, outsole detail, material feature, or supporting prop
environment_variables.LOCATION: clean technical poster field or abstract product-board setting
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: grid, top strip, inset details, callout lines, technical marks, and supporting evidence panels
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: short main product headline or model label
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small technical feature text or repeated microtype
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: separator, bracket, arrow, crosshair, measurement tick, or decorative technical symbol
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: styling direction when feet, legs, or motion thumbnails appear
environment_variables.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: observable style traits that must remain visible
environment_variables.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: literal reference content and marks that samples must not recreate

style_fidelity_anchors: Pale white or off-white grid-paper background with faint square guides.
Oversized sneaker hero in a three-quarter product angle, floating on the page with a soft contact shadow.
Coarse black-and-white halftone dots across all photography, product surfaces, and inset images.
Top horizontal strip of small action or texture frames separated by thin white gutters.
Rectangular macro inset panels that crop into shoe materials, outsole tread, foam, stitching, or mesh.
Thin black connector lines, L-shaped brackets, registration crosses, and tiny measurement ticks.
Sparse editorial layout with large negative space around the central shoe.
Pixelated uppercase headline near the lower-left or lower-third area.
Tiny condensed technical captions, feature tags, and repeated microtype blocks.
High-contrast monochrome lighting with deep black shadows and blown-out paper whites.
Product-first hierarchy where the hero shoe dominates and evidence panels support it.
Flat diagrammatic page system surrounding a tactile photographic product cutout.
source_content_to_avoid: Do not recreate the exact PEAK FLASH 2 shoe design, wavy podded outsole silhouette, or original panel arrangement.
Do not use the words PEAK, PEAK SPORTS, PEAK FLASH 2, SNAKE PATTERN, or the original feature caption.
Do not include the PEAK triangle logo or any copied brand mark from the reference.
Do not repeat the original top-strip running poses, seated athlete frame, or exact crop sequence.
Do not reuse the original quote block wording or question-mark filler typography.
Do not show visible Nike swoosh, adidas three-stripe mark, Puma cat/logo, or any other recognizable trademark.
Do not add watermarks, usernames, QR codes, app marks, creator signatures, or platform identity.

visual_deconstruction.style_category: Monochrome sports-footwear technical poster and product dossier.
visual_deconstruction.composition_logic: One monumental isolated footwear product dominates the lower-middle field, supported by a top strip of evidence panels and a few macro callout boxes.
visual_deconstruction.subject_placement: Hero shoe is large, slightly off-center, and shown at a tactile three-quarter angle against a flat grid field.
visual_deconstruction.camera_perspective: Product photography perspective with crisp side and outsole detail, surrounded by flat diagrammatic layout marks.
visual_deconstruction.typography_behavior: Pixelated uppercase model headline, tiny condensed technical captions, compact microtype, and deliberate low-resolution texture.
visual_deconstruction.palette_behavior: Strict black, white, and gray palette; tonal interest comes from halftone density and contrast rather than color.
visual_deconstruction.texture_finish: Newspaper halftone dots, photocopy grain, scanner softness, and crisp black line overlays.
visual_deconstruction.lighting_mood: Hard monochrome product lighting with deep shadows and clean paper whites, measured and analytical rather than lifestyle-driven.

composition: Use one hero footwear product occupying roughly 45 to 60 percent of the image area.
Keep the shoe isolated on a pale grid field with no real-world environment behind it.
Place a narrow sequence of small black-and-white thumbnail panels along the top edge or upper band.
Add two to four macro panels around the product, connected with thin bracket lines or callout paths.
Use tiny technical text blocks in secondary positions such as left-middle, lower-right, or beside an inset.
Preserve asymmetric balance with dense evidence above and a large hero object below.

typography.headline: Uppercase pixel or bitmap sans-serif, low-resolution edges, compact spacing, usually placed in the lower-left or lower-third area.
typography.captions: Tiny condensed uppercase technical captions and feature tags, arranged in short stacked lines.
typography.microtype: Small repeated rows, coded notes, and placeholder-like marks are acceptable if they are not copied from the reference.
rules: Use new generic product names and feature labels.
Do not create price labels, social captions, long ad copy, or brand slogans.

color_palette.behavior: No color accent by default; use halftone density, line weight, and scale for emphasis.

image_treatment.rendering: Photographic footwear cutout processed through monochrome halftone print and scanner grain.
image_treatment.surface: Coarse dot pattern, visible paper grain, rough black edges, and slight photocopy softness.
image_treatment.lighting: High-contrast hard light with deep black shadows and bright paper whites.
image_treatment.depth: Depth appears in the shoe only; the surrounding page elements remain flat and technical.

design_rules: Every default case must be a footwear product poster.
Treat brand names only as generic product-category cues and remove visible logos or trademark marks.
Preserve the monochrome grid, halftone product cutout, top evidence strip, macro callouts, fine connector lines, and pixel typography.
Change the shoe silhouette, text, material story, top-strip content, and macro detail for every case.
Keep the poster sparse and measured rather than turning it into a dense retail advertisement.
Use real-looking shoe materials such as knit mesh, foam, suede, leather, rubber lugs, stitching, or outsole traction.
do: Use a single oversized logo-free shoe as the visual anchor.
Include two to four macro closeups of shoe construction details.
Use black-and-white halftone texture over product and thumbnail imagery.
Add thin callout lines, brackets, crop marks, and registration crosses.
Use compact uppercase feature captions and a pixelated model headline.
avoid: Visible brand logos, trademarks, copied PEAK identity, copied source text, or copied source panel layout.
Full-color sneaker advertising, glossy e-commerce cards, or smooth untextured 3D renders.
Lifestyle backgrounds, cinematic scenes, crowds, retail shelves, price tags, QR codes, or social media UI.
Overcrowded decorative stickers, gradients, bokeh, neon lighting, or colorful poster effects.
Exact recreation of the source shoe's wavy podded outsole and original top-strip action sequence.
negative_prompt: visible brand logos, trademarks, Nike swoosh, adidas three-stripe mark, Puma cat logo, PEAK logo, copied source text, PEAK FLASH 2, PEAK SPORTS, SNAKE PATTERN, exact wavy podded outsole from the reference, watermark, username, QR code, app UI, social media frame, full-color palette, neon gradient, glossy e-commerce product card, lifestyle scene, retail shelf, price tag, cinematic background, smooth untextured 3D render, vector art, flat SVG, HTML mockup, crowded flyer

values.SUBJECT: a logo-free elite carbon-plate road running shoe with aerodynamic foam geometry and knit upper cues associated with modern race footwear
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: presented as a floating technical hero product with the outsole and midsole structure analyzed through callout panels
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: carbon plate slice diagram, knit mesh closeup, foam sidewall macro crop, and rubber forefoot traction detail
values.LOCATION: clean monochrome product-spec poster field on pale engineering grid paper
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: top strip of runner stride crops without visible brand marks, halftone outsole macro panels, thin callout lines, crosshair registration ticks
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: carbon response / knit lock / race day traction / lab grid
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: L-shaped bracket and small crosshair ticks
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: cropped anonymous runner legs in plain black socks within the top strip only, no logos
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: monochrome grid paper, oversized three-quarter shoe hero, coarse halftone, top evidence strip, macro inset panels, thin connector lines, pixel uppercase headline, tiny technical captions, sparse negative space
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no PEAK text or logo, no PEAK FLASH 2 shoe shape, no Nike swoosh, no copied running poses, no original quote block

values.SUBJECT: a logo-free low-profile terrace training sneaker with suede overlays, gum sole, and generic parallel seam channels without any three-stripe mark
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: displayed as a flat archival footwear specimen with material panels explaining suede nap, stitch density, and gum outsole grip
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: suede toe box macro, gum rubber edge closeup, lace eyelet crop, and sidewall stitching detail
values.LOCATION: minimal black-and-white catalog analysis board on faint square grid paper
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: top strip of close cropped indoor court footwork frames, boxed material samples, fine grid-aligned callout paths, small registration crosses
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: suede shell / gum edge / court archive / indoor grip
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: small triangular arrow markers and bracket ticks
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: anonymous cropped track pants and plain socks in the top-strip action panels, no logos
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: black-white-gray palette, pale grid field, oversized shoe cutout, gritty halftone dots, top film-strip panels, small macro boxes, fine connector lines, pixel model label, compact feature captions
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no PEAK identity, no adidas logo or three-stripe mark, no exact source shoe, no source text, no source action sequence

values.SUBJECT: a logo-free suede court sneaker with a low rounded profile, thick laces, textured rubber cupsole, and a generic sweeping side panel that is not a trademark
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: shown as a lab-scanned court shoe with inset panels isolating suede grain, lace weave, heel padding, and cupsole texture
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: suede grain crop, lace knot macro, cupsole texture panel, heel collar foam detail
values.LOCATION: monochrome product dossier page with off-white technical grid background
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: upper band of court pivot motion crops, small boxed material samples, thin stepped connector line, crop corners, micro measurement marks
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: suede density / lace load / heel pad / grip shell
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: stepped connector line with square registration marks
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: plain monochrome court socks and cropped practice shorts visible only in the thumbnail strip, no logo marks
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: oversized central shoe, monochrome halftone print, pale grid-paper background, top thumbnail strip, macro material insets, thin callouts, pixelated uppercase headline, tiny technical labels, sparse editorial spacing
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no PEAK logo, no Puma cat logo or formstrip trademark, no copied PEAK FLASH 2 shape, no original feature caption, no watermarks

values.SUBJECT: a logo-free technical trail running shoe with armored mesh, reinforced toe bumper, sculpted midsole, and aggressive rubber lugs
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: analyzed as an off-road traction platform with closeups of mud lugs, toe protection, drainage mesh, and heel stability geometry
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: lugged outsole macro, toe bumper material crop, mesh drainage panel, heel stabilizer closeup
values.LOCATION: clean studio product-spec board on pale monochrome grid paper, no landscape scene
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: top strip of abstract trail foot placement crops without scenery, boxed outsole closeups, L-shaped callout brackets, small grid ticks and corner crop marks
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: lug index / mesh drain / toe shield / heel lock
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: crosshair plus long L-shaped callout bracket
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: anonymous cropped trail socks and plain black gaiter fragments in thumbnails only, no logos
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: monochrome technical poster, central oversized footwear hero, coarse halftone texture, faint grid background, top evidence strip, macro inset boxes, thin connector lines, pixel headline, tiny feature captions, high-contrast print lighting
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no PEAK text, no PEAK logo, no exact wavy pod sole from the reference, no real outdoor brand logos, no copied source panels or captions
